title: VEGCOO 3 Pack Flush Valve Seal Compatible with Ideal Standard, Replacement Flush Valve Seal & Clip for Ideal Standard Armitage Shanks SV01967, SV93467, EV98167 (White)
features: Compatibility & Precision Fit: Specifically designed for Ideal Standard Armitage Shanks SV01967, SV93467, EV98167 flush valves. Ensures a perfect seal and smooth operation in standard cisterns, providing reliable performance and preventing water leaks.

Pack Contents: Includes 3 white flush valve seals and 3 replacement clips, offering great value and convenience. Keep extras on hand for future maintenance or multiple toilet repairs, ensuring you are always prepared.
Size: With a 70mm diameter, meet standard specifications, it conforms to standard specifications and is fully compatible with most toilet cisterns.

Durability & Leak Proof: Constructed from high-performance rubber material. Offers long lasting durability and a tight seal, and this flush valve seal significantly extends its lifespan, reducing the frequency of replacements and ensuring reliable performance over time.

Easy Installation: Designed for straightforward replacement without requiring special tools or plumbing skills. Simply remove the old seal and install this new one to quickly restore your toilet's flushing efficiency in just a few minutes.
description: Brand: VEGCOO Product name: Flush Valve Seal Quantity: 3 pieces Colour: white Material: high-performance rubber material Size: 70mm We guarantee that the products we offer are brand new. If you have any questions or requirements about our products, please feel free to contact us. We will do our best to get back to you as soon as possible.
